title: Exclusivity as a Chinese Trait
html: Stub. Yahir's one-line field observation from 2024 09 02 notes on the chinese: "they embrace exclusivity to a higher degree." Whether about social circles, club access, brand status, or guanxi-style in-group preference is unspecified — flesh out when more notes corroborate.
